description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Heel: 3.5" Product Description Black peep-toe slingback styling with cut-outs and a floral detail at the forefoot Padded footbed Thick wedge heel with grooves TPR outsole with dotted grooves all over Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
